title: Operation & Maintenance Technician
description:
Job Description

The role of the Technician is to carry out routine and non-routine maintenance activities. The Technician ensures the quality of maintenance work in his/her designated area and ensures that the necessary standards of housekeeping and safe work practices are maintained.

· Operations and Maintenance of the Baggage Handling System (BHS) in Singapore Changi Airport.

· Adhere to all safety rules and regulations while executing tasks.

· Execute quality and timely work.

· Perform routine and non-routine maintenance activities in one or more designated work areas.

· Respond quickly to faults and disruptions of the BHS system.

· Adhere to customer site rules and regulations.

· Deliver materials in need of repair to respective site.

· Return excess materials to delivery zones or the main office.

· Enter accurate and timely work order completion data.

· Contribute to modification or replacement of equipment.

· Assist with the installation of new assets.

· Assist with overall site housekeeping.

· Assist with work planning.

· Assists in breakdown recovery.

· Updates and upkeeps maintenance checklist.

· Updates and upkeeps pre-emptive maintenance checklist.

· Replacement of all equipment on request.


Requirements

Electrical Technician

· NTC / Nitec / Diploma in Electrical / Electronic Engineering.

· OR similar technical certification from a reputable institute.

· Able to read electrical drawing or circuit diagram.

· Relevant working experience.

· Hands-on knowledge on PLC and Frequency Inverters will be an added advantage.

· Knowledge in Microsoft Office.

· Able to work in a rotating shift.


Mechanical Technician

· NTC / Nitec / Diploma in Mechanical / Mechatronic Engineering.

· OR similar technical certification from a reputable institute.

· Relevant working experience.

· Hands-on knowledge on conveyor systems will be an added advantage.

· Knowledge in Microsoft Office.

· Able to work in a rotating shift.


Additional Information

· Work location is in Changi Airport

· Work will be in a restricted area which requires screening by the Airport Police Division.

· Work shift pattern:

o One cycle (2 mornings à 2 afternoons à 2 nights à 2 off days)

o Morning shift – 7.30 am to 3.30 pm

o Afternoon shift – 3.00 pm to 10.30 pm

Night shift – 10.00 pm to 8.00 am

postedCompany.description:
Member of BEUMER Group, we provide solutions and lifetime support for airports, postal facilities, parcel distribution and warehouse and distribution centres. BEUMER Group has led and delivered projects that include many of the world's largest and most advanced baggage and material handling operations, being fully supported by a global network of Customer Service & Support centres.
At BEUMER Group Singapore we work different
At BEUMER Group Singapore, we have a different work style since we have a diversified workforce made up of 12 different nationalities with different cultures and backgrounds. However, when the team gets together, we share the same target and aim to deliver the best results.
postedCompany.name: BEUMER GROUP SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
